info.name: odf-kit Service
info.summary: Export Markdown, HTML, and text files to ODT format
info.description:
Export your Nextcloud files to ODT (OpenDocument Text) — the ISO standard format used by LibreOffice, governments, and organisations worldwide.
## What it does
Click the **Export to ODT** icon in the Nextcloud top navigation bar, pick any Markdown, HTML, or plain text file, choose your page format, and click Export. The ODT file is saved next to the original.
**Supported input formats:** - Markdown (.md) - HTML (.html) - Plain text (.txt)
**Page formats:** A4 (Europe), Letter (USA), Legal, A3, A5
## Why ODT?
ODT is the ISO 26300 standard for word processing documents. Unlike proprietary formats, ODT files are guaranteed to open correctly in LibreOffice, OnlyOffice, and any other standards-compliant office suite — now and in the future. Many European governments mandate ODT for official documents.
## No LibreOffice required
Conversion is powered by odf-kit — a zero-dependency JavaScript library that runs entirely within your Nextcloud instance. No external services, no LibreOffice installation, no server-side rendering processes.
## For developers
odf-kit-service also exposes an HTTP API that other Nextcloud apps and ExApps can call via the AppAPI proxy:
- POST /convert/odt — convert HTML to ODT - POST /generate — build ODT from a JSON document spec - POST /fill — fill an ODT template with data - POST /convert/html — convert ODT to HTML - POST /convert/typst — convert ODT to Typst markup
Any PHP app, ExApp, or browser-based Nextcloud frontend can call these endpoints via /apps/app_api/proxy/odf_kit_service/<route> with AppAPIAuth headers. No knowledge of host, port, or IP is needed.
## Data sovereignty
All processing happens on your own server. No data leaves your Nextcloud instance. Files are read and written via WebDAV using your existing Nextcloud credentials.
## Documentation
Full documentation including manual install instructions, API reference, and examples for calling from other apps: https://github.com/GitHubNewbie0/odf-kit-service#readme
## Source code
https://github.com/GitHubNewbie0/odf-kit-service — AGPLv3
info.author: Scott Wirth
